rationale: Exploratory stronger Lucknow cleanup. It reduces temporal and spatial-CV dependence slightly more than the main sensitivity but has a larger reference-mean MAE.
Optional Chicago QA/QC check only. It removes a small number of long-gap sensors and barely changes the mean, but it should not be treated as improving MAR diagnostics.
Diagnostic only. It shows that proportional worst-sensor removal is not a good Dhaka rule because it introduces stronger temporal association and changes the reference mean.
